description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine branch_data_3, and is implemented by a call to branch_data_3. Use this API to modify the data of an existing non-transformer branch in the working case or to add a new non-transformer branch to the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Non- Transformer Branch Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = branch_data(ibus, jbus, ckt, intgar, realar)
python_syntax: ierr = branch_data(ibus, jbus, ckt, intgar, realar)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of from bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Bus number of to bus. (input; no default allowed).

intgar.description: ST, branch status (1 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘st’.
METBUS, metered end bus number (IBUS or JBUS) (IBUS by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘metbus’.
O1, first owner number (owner of bus IBUS by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘o1’.
O2, second owner number (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘o2’.
O3, third owner number (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘o3’.
O4, fourth owner number (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘o4’.

realar.description: R, nominal branch resistance (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘r’.
X, nominal branch reactance (THRSHZ by default; 0.0001 if THRSHZ = 0.0), can also be specified with keyword ‘x’.
B, total line charging (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘b’.
RATEA, rating set A line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘ratea’.
RATEB, rating set B line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rateb’.
RATEC, rating set C line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘ratec’.
GI, real line shunt at bus IBUS end (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘gi’.
BI, reactive line shunt at bus IBUS end (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘bi’.
GJ, real line shunt at bus JBUS end (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘gj’.
BJ, reactive line shunt at bus JBUS end (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘bj’.
LEN, line length (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘len’.
F1, first owner fraction (1.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘f1’.
F2, second owner fraction (1.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘f2’.
F3, third owner fraction (1.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘f3’.
F4, fourth owner fraction (1.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘f4’.

error_codes.description: circuit identifier is more than two characters.
branch exists but it is a two-winding transformer.
branch from a bus to itself.
circuit identifier may not start with &
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - branch reactance is 0.0 - line length is negative - zero impedance line table is full; branch is treated as a normal line - invalid metered end bus - invalid branch status - invalid owner number - invalid ownership fraction - no ownership data is specified - multi-section line grouping deleted - branch ownership table is full–only first n owners retained - branch is no longer treated as a zero impedance line - owner table is full.
